positive: A stylized, highly detailed illustration of a whimsical, glowing forest portal entrance, viewed head-on. The scene features a massive, ancient tree with glowing root structures forming an archway. Underneath the arch, bioluminescent jungle flora, glowing moss, and crystalline mushrooms create a vivid, surreal palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, and soft lavender. Central composition, strong contrast between the deep forest shadows and the vibrant glow. Perfect for apparel print, clean silhouette, vector art style mixed with digital illustration, symmetrical composition, crisp linework, clean edges, cinematic studio lighting, high saturation.
